title: BrassProcess
body:
# Brass_process

BrassProcess added some metals: zinc, brass, and a food: candy.



Zinc can be made into tools, and brass can be made into tools and armor.


[Demo video](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1bW4y137m7/)

Formula: 

brass ingot: two copper ingots on the top and one zinc ingot on the bottom, forming a corner (see the video for details) 

Zinc ingot: smelting raw zinc in the furnace

Raw zinc: mining zinc ore with iron and above picks to obtain
zinc ore block: obtained in the creation mode, naturally generated in the shallow layer (above the 0 layer) 

Zinc tools: the same as the original formula, only replaced with zinc ingots. 

Brass tools and armor: the same as the original formula, but replaced with brass ingots.

Update log:

1.0-snapshot: first update

FAQ Q&A:

Q: How to obtain zinc ore in survival mode

A: Zinc ore can't be obtained temporarily in survival mode. Even if you dig with a precise pick, it won't fall.



[Bug feedback](https://github.com/seoul2k/brass_process/issues)

[Source code address](https://github.com/seoul2k/brass_process)
